scripts.dev: concurrently "npm -w apps/api run dev" "npm -w apps/web run dev"
scripts.lint: npm run check:js-boundaries && npm -w apps/web run lint && npm -w apps/api run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:web && npm -w apps/api run typecheck && npm -w apps/mobile run typecheck
scripts.test: npm -w apps/web run test:run && npm -w apps/api run test:run
scripts.build: npm -w apps/web run build && npm -w apps/api run build
